src: Easily make Flutter apps responsive. Automatically adapt UI to different screen sizes. Responsiveness made simple. Demo: https://gallery.codelessly.com/flutterwebsites/minimal/
ja: Flutterアプリを簡単にレスポンシブ対応にする。さまざまな画面サイズにUIを自動適応。シンプルなレスポンシブ実装。デモ: https://gallery.codelessly.com/flutterwebsites/minimal/
